name: Faster intervention = better outcomes
info: Proper first aid can prevent infection, reduce bleeding, stablize injuries -> potentially saving lives or reducing severity before pros arrive. Especially huge in remote/rural areas with delayed help.

name: Auto hospital alerts with your exact location
info: (Satelite use for iPhone 14 and later). It bridges the gap - notifies nearest facilities instantly. In low-connectivity zones, this could cut response times dramatically and improve survivor rates in emergencies.

name: Empowers everyday people.
info: Works offline for basics -> anyone with a smartphone becomes better prepared. Reduces burden on issues at home and escalating real emergencies efficiently
